blogs.title: Getting Started with React
blogs.description: Learn the basics of React and build modern UI.
blogs.author: John Doe
blogs.content: React is an open-source JavaScript library for building user interfaces (UI), primarily for single-page applications where parts of the page need to update dynamically without a full reload. It is maintained by Meta (formerly Facebook) and a large community of developers.

blogs.title: Future of AI
blogs.author: Sarah Lee
blogs.content: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is technology that enables computers to simulate human intelligence, such as learning, reasoning, problem-solving, and creativity. It powers applications that analyze vast data to identify patterns, make decisions, and generate content, including generative AI (text/images) and agents that act autonomously

blogs.title: Modern Web Development
blogs.author: Alex Brown
blogs.content: Web development is the process of creating, building, and maintaining websites and web applications that run online, ranging from simple text pages to complex, interactive platforms. It involves a mix of front-end (user-facing), back-end (server-side), and database management to ensure functionality, performance, and security.

blogs.title: Focuses on JavaScript
blogs.description: Walsh provides in-depth, practical examples of modern JavaScript.
blogs.author: David Walsh
blogs.content: David Walsh (davidwalsh.name) is a highly respected web developer, software engineer, and technical author based in Madison, Wisconsin. His blog, davidwalsh.name, is a long-standing, popular resource known for practical tutorials on JavaScript, CSS, and modern web technologies.Walsh provides in-depth, practical examples of modern JavaScript, including asynchronous programming, Fetch API, Promise API, and various JavaScript libraries and frameworks.
